name: obsidian-codex-plugin
description: Codex-native Obsidian wiki workflows for setup, ingest, retrieval, linting, research, canvas, methodology modes, and session memory.

interface.shortDescription: Run a self-organizing Obsidian wiki from Codex.
interface.longDescription: A clean-room Codex-native Obsidian wiki plugin that scaffolds seeded vaults, ingests sources into linked notes, retrieves cited pages, lints wiki health, saves sessions, plans research, manages canvases, and configures methodology modes using filesystem-first helpers with optional transport detection.
defaultPrompt: Set up an Obsidian wiki vault.
Ingest this source into my wiki.
Save this conversation to my wiki.
